name: conditional-get contract: conditional GET never suppresses a diff when content actually changed
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id aws --store-dir "$PWD/s" --simulate-status 200 --body-hash first >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id aws --store-dir "$PWD/s" --simulate-status 200 --body-hash second
